meta.title: Hacker History Project - The Dark Tangent Interviewed at DEF CON 5 - courtesy of ZDnet
meta.description: DEF CON founder Jeff Moss talks about the conference's origin story to a ZDnet reporter at DEF CON 5. The venue is the Aladdin Hotel and Casino in Las Vegas, in July of 1997.
